span.p:
LLM Self-Reflect
Generate reusable insight:
query_pattern, failure_reason,
suggested_improvement, key_topics

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Store to TimescaleDB
event_type: reflexion_insight
Persists permanently

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
FUTURE QUERIES:
Fetch matching insights
Inject into ReACT prompt
as 'Learnings from past'

span.p:
LLM Evaluate
5 criteria, each 0.0 to 1.0:
completeness, accuracy,
relevance, clarity, actionability
